subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-22 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: In Adrianople, vis-à-vis of our house, there was a café. Here sat every day a retired officer from the Turkish Army belonging to the Baktashi's sect.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @humor; jokes, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
